changelog: The Meta tab in the settings popup now looks way cleaner and is actually readable.
Meta settings now have their own brief descriptions when hovering over the setting.
Data Storage tracking has been reworked for a future update for the apworld, therefore autotab switching and boss tracking do not work on this version for the time being.

You can now preview a portrait and its locations from the Castle map, shown as a trapezoid. These will also be placed is correlation to your portrait configuration. This can be enabled in the meta tab. By Radis7Noir
To account for the new trapezoids, the location for Brauner has been moved to his own room slightly to the left of the portrait gallery.
Added some sequence break logic for using puppet master to get to tower of death early.
Added open throne to the settings popup.
Boss keys have now been added in a new items tab.
Misc logic updates with the new apworld version.
